description_long: This object is a stylized representation of a duck, featuring a smooth, rounded body with a dark brown coloration and a slightly glossy finish. The head is spherical and painted a deep green, with a yellow beak and a small white ring at the base of the neck, reminiscent of a male Mallard. The tail is angular and pointed, with three distinct notches, and the overall form is streamlined, suggesting buoyancy. The surface appears hard and plastic-like, with minimal textural detail and a uniform sheen. There are no visible legs or feet, and the underside is not shown, implying it is designed to rest flat on a surface. The object is likely hollow, lightweight, and intended as a decoy or decorative item.
description: A smooth, glossy, stylized duck with a green head, yellow beak, and dark brown body, resembling a Mallard. The form is streamlined and hard, with a notched tail and minimal surface detail.
description_view_0: Side view showing the green head, yellow beak, white neck ring, and the full length of the dark brown body with a notched tail.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the pointed, notched tail and the rounded back, with the head facing away and only the back of the green head visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the green head, yellow beak, and the smooth, continuous curve of the brown body and tail.
description_view_3: Front angled view focusing on the yellow beak, green head, and the transition to the brown body, with the notched tail visible in the background.
